subject: English
source: Aruvi static lookup. Spines derived from NCF Languages CG (Section 2.4.1.1, Preparatory Stage) and NCF pedagogy for preparatory English (Section 2.6.1.1.1). 5 prep-native spines replace the middle-stage 6-spine model: Listening and Speaking are merged into Oracy (per NCF: 'Listening and speaking activities occur together'); Vocabulary/Grammar is expanded to Word Work (foundational decoding work at this stage). Per-chapter c_code emission is restricted to spines actually present in the chapter (see cowork prompt Step 8).
notes_on_stretch: Two prep CG outcomes don't fully cover the actual chapter content: (a) phonics, sound-blend drills, alphabet/sight-word work have no native prep CG home (CG-5 at prep is library use, not phonetics — the phonetics CG appears only at middle). We stretch phonics under C-4.1 (vocabulary through listening) since pronunciation is a facet of word knowledge. (b) Craft/puzzle/riddle tasks in Beyond-the-Text are not strictly library-use either. We stretch them under C-5.2 (interest in reading extends to interest-in-extension activities). Both stretches are flagged here for honesty; they keep the mapping NCF-grounded without inventing codes.

oracy.label: Oracy
oracy.notes: Merged Listening + Speaking. Covers free/guided conversation, role-play, recitation, narration, retelling, show-and-tell, oral Q&A, and listening tasks (e.g. listen-and-respond, sound-pair discrimination). Where a sub-task is a listening task, transcript_ref and transcript_text are attached to that task object.

reading.label: Reading
reading.notes: Sub-modes: picture_reading (no-text visual narrative), read_aloud (teacher-led), shared_reading, guided_reading, independent_reading, repeated_reading. Picture reading routes here under C-2.1 (visualising as a comprehension strategy). Comprehension is bundled in — no separate comprehension spine.

writing.label: Writing
writing.notes: Modelled → guided → independent progression. Outputs at prep are short: labels, captions, single sentences, picture-prompted SCRs, lists, simple paragraphs by Grade V, simple poems/dialogues. No ECR at prep.

word_work.label: Word Work
word_work.notes: First-class home for phonics (sound blends, sight words, alphabet work), word-building, contextual prediction, spelling discrimination, crosswords, word search, riddles, and word games. Grammar appears in context only — never as isolated rules — and is tagged under C-3.4 (grammar in writing). Phonics tasks are stretched under C-4.1 (see notes_on_stretch).

beyond_text.label: Beyond the Text
beyond_text.notes: Crafts, projects, songs, drawings, library exploration, simple research, riddles, optical-illusion / puzzle tasks. Craft/puzzle tasks are stretched under C-5.2 (see notes_on_stretch).
